about.paragraph: I'm Nikolas – web developer, photographer, and licensed drone pilot. With me you get design, code, and content from one person: a single point of contact from the first call to launch, short feedback loops, and a result that stands apart from the template crowd.
bullets: High-performance sites and landing pages (Astro, Cloudflare)
Event photography, drone shots, and video editing
Clear process and communication from brief to delivery

faq.heading: Frequently asked.
faq.lead: Short, honest answers – everything else we can cover in a free intro call.

items.a: It depends on the scope: a focused landing page takes far less time than a full presence with photo and video production. After the free intro call you get a transparent proposal with a clearly defined scope – no hidden costs.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: A landing page is typically live within a few weeks; a larger site takes correspondingly longer. We define the concrete timeline in the intro call – with clear milestones, so you always know where your project stands.

items.q: How are you different from a traditional agency?
items.a: You work directly with the person who designs and builds your project – no project managers in between, no overhead. That means short feedback loops, fast decisions, and a coherent result across design, code, photo, and video.

items.q: Can I maintain the website myself afterwards?
items.a: Yes. Depending on the project I build on WordPress or a modern stack like Astro – either way you get a handover session and can update content yourself. And if you'd rather have support, I'm available after launch too.

items.q: I already have a website – is a relaunch worth it?
items.a: If your site loads slowly, looks broken on phones, or barely generates inquiries – usually yes. In the intro call we take an honest look: sometimes targeted optimization is enough, sometimes a rebuild is the better investment.

contact.headline: Let's build something memorable.
contact.subline: Tell me briefly about your project – I'll reply personally within 24 hours. No strings attached.
